description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a white whipped cream exterior and a glossy dark chocolate ganache drip along the top edge. The cake is topped with an assortment of fresh fruit slices, including strawberries, kiwi, and orange, arranged in a decorative pattern. There is a rectangular white chocolate plaque with writing placed on top, adding a celebratory touch. The cake sits on a square golden board, which is itself placed on a black, fluted-edge plastic plate. The plate and cake are presented on a light brown paper or cardboard base. The overall appearance is festive and inviting, suitable for celebrations.
description: A round, single-tier cake with white whipped cream, chocolate ganache drip, and assorted fresh fruit on top, presented on a black plate with a golden board.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chocolate plaque with writing, fruit toppings, and the full chocolate drip effect.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the fruit arrangement and the side of the cake, with the chocolate drip and whipped cream details visible.
description_view_2: The cake's top and fruit decorations are prominent, with the chocolate drip and golden board clearly seen.
description_view_3: Back view focuses on the fruit topping and the smooth white whipped cream sides, with less emphasis on the plaque.
